shortDescription: Encrypted local vault for AI agents. Store credentials, reference as {{PLACEHOLDER}}.
fullDescription:
EnigmAgent is a privacy-first credential vault for AI developers and automation engineers.

Instead of hardcoding API keys, tokens, and passwords in AI agent prompts — store them locally in AES-256-GCM encrypted storage and reference them as {{PLACEHOLDER}} symbols.

The vault resolves them at execution time. Your credentials never appear in AI context windows, logs, or cloud services.

✅ Features:
• AES-256-GCM + Argon2id encryption
• {{PLACEHOLDER}} reference system
• 40+ AI framework integrations (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, n8n, etc.)
• Full offline operation
• Samsung DeX compatible
• No accounts, no cloud, no telemetry

Ideal for: AI developers, DevOps engineers, security-conscious power users.
